mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_ID, CHANGE_TYPE, CASE CHANGE_TYPE WHEN 'BASIC_INFO' THEN '设备基本信息' WHEN 'FINANCE' THEN '财务信息' WHEN 'SUPPLY' THEN '供货信息' WHEN 'SPECIAL_INFO' THEN '特种设备信息' ELSE CHANGE_TYPE END AS CHANGE_TYPE_NAME, CHANGE_BY, CHANGE_BY_NAME, CHANGE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_CHANGE_LOG WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_CHANGE_LOG ( ID, EQUIP_ID, CHANGE_TYPE, CHANGE_BY, CHANGE_BY_NAME, CHANGE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{equipId}, #{changeType}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changeTime}, 0, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
